rows.label: tev001291_MSG0001
rows.name:
Oh, hey, [ST:playername ]-san! Are you here
to test some new weapon?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001291_MSG0002
rows.name:
I was just wondering if I could maybe
improve the flight pack's intake bypass...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001291_MSG0003
rows.name:
I was just wondering if I could
make the flight pack's energy
performance more efficient...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001291_MSG0004
rows.name:
I was just hearing all sorts of thing
from one of the Arms Company mechanics![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001291_MSG0005
rows.name:
As expected, hearing from people
involved in frontline weapon
development is amazing, isn't it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001291_MSG0006
rows.name:
It's surprising how much NLA
technology advances even while
we're out on BLADE missions![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001291_JNK0010
rows.name: Worry

rows.label: tev001291_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask if she'd prefer to focus on being a mechanic.

rows.label: tev001291_JNK0020
rows.name: Suggest

rows.label: tev001291_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask if it wouldn't be better for her to focus on missions.

rows.label: tev001291_MSG0007
rows.name:
Sure, sometimes I feel envious of people
who get to work with the latest technology
on the front lines, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001291_MSG0008
rows.name:
BLADE work helps with
development too, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001291_MSG0009
rows.name:
For example[ST:wide ]— the other day during
a mission, I spotted an auravis
flying way up in the sky.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001291_MSG0010
rows.name:
When I was watching its gliding
posture really closely... I got
an idea for a new tail assembly![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001291_MSG0011
rows.name:
At that moment, I was a little moved,
thinking, "I'm glad I'm a BLADE!"[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001291_MSG0012
rows.name: ...[ST:playername ]-san, thanks for worrying about me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001291_MSG0013
rows.name:
I intend to do it so it doesn't
interfere with missions, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001291_MSG0014
rows.name:
Does it really look
like I'm not focused?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001291_MSG0015
rows.name:
Hmm... I'll be careful from now on... If I'm
not consciously trying not to, inevitably,
even when I'm fighting native creatures...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001291_MSG0016
rows.name:
The way their bodies move, their
structure... I can't help thinking,
"Could I apply that to a Doll?"...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001291_MSG0017
rows.name:
Thanks for always honestly
pointing out my shortcomings.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001291_MSG0018
rows.name:
The reason I can continue development
even now is because Elma-san and
you, [ST:playername ]-san are always helping me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001291_JNK0030
rows.name: Praise

rows.label: tev001291_SEL0031
rows.name: Pat her head, saying it's thanks to her hard work.

rows.label: tev001291_JNK0040
rows.name: Point Out

rows.label: tev001291_SEL0041
rows.name: Point out that she forgot Doug.

rows.label: tev001291_MSG0019
rows.name:
Ehehe... [ST:playername ]-san, you're kind of
like a father... Thank you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001291_MSG0020
rows.name:
Ehehe...... [ST:playername ]-san, you're somehow like
a mother...... Thank you very much![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001291_MSG0021
rows.name:
I want to work much, much
harder and make lots of machines
that will help everyone![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001291_MSG0022
rows.name:
The other day, there was that accident
where the booster engine blew up big
time, but... I absolutely won't give up![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001291_MSG0023
rows.name:
So, [ST:playername ]-san, you too, please join me
on experiments as a test pilot![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001291_JNK0050
rows.name: Accept

rows.label: tev001291_SEL0051
rows.name: Give a thumbs-up with a smile, while hiding your fear.

rows.label: tev001291_JNK0060
rows.name: Decline

rows.label: tev001291_SEL0061
rows.name: Firmly refuse.

rows.label: tev001291_MSG0024
rows.name:
Really!? There were lots of
things I wanted to try, but just
having Doug-san wasn't enough![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001291_MSG0025
rows.name:
Well then, I'll make a whole bunch, so
next time please stick with me for
thorough testing! I'm counting on you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001291_MSG0026
rows.name: You look pale... Are you feeling unwell?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001291_MSG0027
rows.name:
Hmm. That's too bad, but if that's
the case, it can't be helped.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001291_MSG0028
rows.name:
For the time being, I guess I'll just
have Doug-san keep trying his best![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001291_MSG0029
rows.name: Oops! I completely forgot![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001291_MSG0030
rows.name:
That's right! Because Doug-san's
body is so sturdy, we've been able
to keep testing this whole time![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001291_MSG0031
rows.name:
The next flight test looks like
it'll be pretty intense, though...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001291_MSG0032
rows.name:
Doug-san will surely be okay, right! I
think I'll have him try his very best![ST:wait ]
